title: Supervise artificial breeding and embryo transfer programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise artificial breeding and embryo transfer programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine breeding method

pcs.text: Review options for artificial breeding to determine most suitable and affordable method according to breeding objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review options for artificial breeding to determine most suitable and affordable method according to breeding objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review options for artificial breeding to determine most suitable and affordable method according to breeding objectives.

pcs.text: Select and match artificial breeding option to resources and breeding objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and match artificial breeding option to resources and breeding objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and match artificial breeding option to resources and breeding objectives.

pcs.text: Identify, source and arrange breeding program resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source and arrange breeding program resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source and arrange breeding program resources.

pcs.text: Prepare program schedules according to available resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare program schedules according to available resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare program schedules according to available resources.

pcs.text: Source personal protective equipment for staff and self, according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source personal protective equipment for staff and self, according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source personal protective equipment for staff and self, according to workplace health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine breeding method

elements.title: Implement breeding method

pcs.text: Check the disease status of donor and recipient animals according to biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the disease status of donor and recipient animals according to biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the disease status of donor and recipient animals according to biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Obtain genetic material from appropriate and reliable source
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain genetic material from appropriate and reliable source?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain genetic material from appropriate and reliable source.

pcs.text: Select tools and or materials required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and or materials required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and or materials required.

pcs.text: Receive, check and store genetic material according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive, check and store genetic material according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive, check and store genetic material according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Handle animals according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle animals according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle animals according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Ensure females are inseminated at the optimal stage of oestrus cycle where artificial insemination is the selected option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure females are inseminated at the optimal stage of oestrus cycle where artificial insemination is the selected option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure females are inseminated at the optimal stage of oestrus cycle where artificial insemination is the selected option.

pcs.text: Check to ensure intended recipients are prepared and correctly scheduled where ET is the selected option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check to ensure intended recipients are prepared and correctly scheduled where ET is the selected option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check to ensure intended recipients are prepared and correctly scheduled where ET is the selected option.

pcs.text: Provide hormone injections to intended recipients or donors at appropriate stages of transfer programs where ET is selected option according to veterinary prescription
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide hormone injections to intended recipients or donors at appropriate stages of transfer programs where ET is selected option according to veterinary prescription?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide hormone injections to intended recipients or donors at appropriate stages of transfer programs where ET is selected option according to veterinary prescription.

pcs.text: Conduct embryo transfers according to codes of practice and industry standards where ET is selected option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct embryo transfers according to codes of practice and industry standards where ET is selected option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct embryo transfers according to codes of practice and industry standards where ET is selected option.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement breeding method

elements.title: Monitor and maintain program

pcs.text: Monitor environment and health of livestock in breeding program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor environment and health of livestock in breeding program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor environment and health of livestock in breeding program.

pcs.text: Review adjustments in genetic material transfer practices to enhance success of future programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review adjustments in genetic material transfer practices to enhance success of future programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review adjustments in genetic material transfer practices to enhance success of future programs.

pcs.text: Document and maintain data on genetic material transfer programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and maintain data on genetic material transfer programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and maintain data on genetic material transfer programs.
